series_metadata.series_description: This file series consists of information from various source documents which describe the current intersection layout, phasing diagram, serial or unique number of controller and monitor, date of monitor testing, intersection annual inspection documentation, and any repairs or maintenance performed on ODOT maintained electrical traffic control devices. Its purpose is to provide a ready reference for reports on traffic operations at an intersection and for use by employees when called to testify in legal actions regarding the signal operation. The record originates in the field district. The districts will file original records by signal number, County-Route-Section (Mile Marker), or County-Route at Cross Road.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper copy shall be retained until such time that the information is recorded in the appropriate electronic database, at which time the paper documents can be destroyed ; Electronic: The electronic information shall be retained for three years from date of work. After this period concludes, the records will be deleted from the relevant electronic database. The OSIS database will reside in Central Office, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
